title: SEO Evolved — AIO & GEO
tagline: SEO was just Google. Now it's AI too. We rank you on both.
description: Search has evolved. SEO used to mean just Google — now your customers also get answers from AI Overviews (AIO) and AI tools like ChatGPT & Perplexity (GEO). We make sure your business is visible on all three.
longDescription: Search is evolving fast. We future-proof your business with traditional Google SEO, AI Overviews (AIO) optimization so you appear in Google's AI-generated answers, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) targeting ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini. From technical audits to high-authority link building, we cover every angle so you rank everywhere your customers search — today and tomorrow.

title: Website Development
tagline: From Local Sites to Enterprise Platforms.
description: WordPress sites for local businesses and large-scale web solutions for enterprise brands — all built for speed, SEO, and maximum conversions.
longDescription: Whether you're a local business needing a clean WordPress site or a growing brand needing a custom enterprise-grade platform, we build it right. Every project is mobile-first, Core Web Vitals optimized, and SEO-ready from day one. We handle design, development, CMS setup, and ongoing maintenance so you can focus on your business.

title: Social Media Marketing
tagline: Build a Brand. Grow a Following.
description: Strategic social media management and paid campaigns that build your brand presence, grow engaged audiences, and drive real business results.
longDescription: We manage your social presence across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, and more — from content strategy and daily posting to paid social campaigns and influencer collaborations. Every post, reel, and campaign is designed to grow your audience and convert followers into customers.

title: Graphic Designing
description: Professional graphic design for brands, businesses, and campaigns — logos, social graphics, ad creatives, and complete brand identity systems.
longDescription: Great design builds trust instantly. Our design team creates scroll-stopping visuals for every touchpoint — from your brand identity and logo to social media graphics, advertising creatives, flyers, banners, and pitch decks. We combine strategic thinking with premium aesthetics to make your brand impossible to ignore.

title: Video Editing
description: Commercial and promotional video editing for local and large businesses — short-form reels, YouTube videos, ads, and full brand films.
longDescription: Video is the #1 content format driving engagement and conversions today. Our video editing team transforms your raw footage into polished, professional content — from 15-second Instagram reels and TikTok clips to full YouTube videos, TV commercials, and brand documentaries. Perfect for local businesses promoting their services and large companies running commercial campaigns.

title: Content Marketing
description: Strategic content that attracts your ideal customers, builds authority, and drives organic growth at scale across every channel.
longDescription: From SEO blog posts and long-form pillar pages to email sequences and video scripts, our content team creates expert-level assets that rank and resonate. Every piece is strategically mapped to your buyer's journey to accelerate pipeline growth and build lasting brand authority.

title: GMB Optimization
description: Dominate local search with expert Google Business Profile (GMB) optimization that puts your business in the top 3 map results.
longDescription: For local businesses, the Google Map Pack is the most valuable piece of real estate online. We fully optimize your Google Business Profile — categories, photos, posts, Q&A, reviews, citations — and build local authority signals that push you into the top 3 results across your service areas. We cover 25+ US cities and expand globally.

title: PPC Advertising
description: ROI-focused Google Ads and Meta Ads management that turns ad spend into predictable, scalable revenue streams.
longDescription: Our certified PPC specialists manage campaigns with surgical precision — optimizing every keyword, bid, and creative to maximize return. We combine advanced audience targeting, continuous A/B testing, and real-time bid management to ensure every dollar works harder than the last.

title: AI Automation
description: Leverage AI-powered automation to capture more leads, follow up instantly, and scale your business worldwide without scaling headcount.
longDescription: We implement cutting-edge AI tools — from automated outreach and lead nurturing to predictive analytics and workflow automation — allowing your business to operate at 10x capacity. Our AI solutions integrate seamlessly with your existing CRM and marketing stack, available to businesses worldwide.

title: Chatbot Development
description: Custom AI-powered chatbots for websites, WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook — capturing leads and serving customers around the clock.
longDescription: We build intelligent chatbots that work 24/7 to qualify leads, answer customer questions, book appointments, and drive sales — all without human intervention. Deployed across your website, WhatsApp, Instagram DMs, and Facebook Messenger, our bots are trained on your business to deliver personalized, accurate responses that convert.
